text:
The is the principal of Attack Junior High School.

Appearance

The Colossal Titan is the tallest Titan, being able to peer over the Walls of Titan Junior High. Its features are rather disproportionate to its body, having a rather small head and skinny arms.

Story

On the first day of school, the principal attends the first-years' entrance ceremony. Suddenly, the Colossal Titan breaks down the school Walls and lets the Titan students invade the human grounds.

After a group of Titan students steal the human students' food stands and bring them to the principal, the Colossal Titan tries to devour a cheeseburger stand from its lunch box, ignoring a human student nearby. The human then lunges himself at the principal while it eats the stand, and is swallowed as well. However, the principal spits him out shortly afterward.

Trivia

It is the only character that is not portrayed in Junior High style, but retains its same appearance from the main anime.
